title: Write a BUILD target with correct deps and visibility
description: Add a library or binary target to a BUILD file with precise srcs, deps, and visibility, then verify the graph with bazel query.
body: Use when adding a component to a Bazel package. Do not over-broaden deps or default visibility to public. Actions: declare the target with its srcs; list only the deps it directly uses; set visibility to the packages that should consume it; run bazel build and bazel query to confirm edges. Validation signals include a successful build, a query graph matching intent, and a visibility error for unauthorized consumers. Risk boundary: broad deps or public visibility couple the graph and force large rebuilds, so keep both narrow and verify with query.
